title: What our community says
subtitle: Real experiences from freelancers, students, and visitors

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.quote: The best spot in Ozamiz to get work done. Fast wifi, great coffee, and the staff are always friendly. I come here almost every week.

reviews.name: Jake T.
reviews.quote: Perfect for studying with friends. Quiet enough to focus but the vibe is never boring. Love the matcha and the rice meals when we pull all-nighters.

reviews.name: Ana L.
reviews.quote: We held our first meetup here and the space was ideal. Good seating, good drinks, and the team helped us with setup. Will definitely book again.

reviews.name: Rico M.
reviews.quote: Reliable internet and plenty of outlets. The ube latte is my go-to. Workflow feels like a second office.

reviews.name: Patricia G.
reviews.quote: Stumbled upon Workflow while in town. Cozy, clean, and the caramel macchiato hit the spot. Would recommend to anyone passing through Ozamiz.
